item.text: I’ll build a compact, dependency-free move generator with legality filtering for every special move, then exercise it directly through stdin across check, castling, en passant, promotion, and both colors. I’ll keep all testing ephemeral so `agent.js` remains the only file.

The implementation is in place. I’m now checking syntax/size and probing positions where ordinary movement, check evasion, castling rights, en passant targets, and promotions materially affect the legal move set.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "node --check agent.js
wc -c agent.js
for fen in \\
'rnbqkbnr/pppppppp/8/8/8/8/PPPPPPPP/RNBQKBNR w KQkq - 0 1' \\
'rnbqkbnr/pppppppp/8/8/8/8/PPPPPPPP/RNBQKBNR b KQkq - 0 1' \\
'4k3/8/8/8/8/8/8/4R1K1 b - - 0 1' \\
'r3k2r/8/8/8/8/8/8/R3K2R w KQkq - 0 1' \\
'4k3/8/8/3pP3/8/8/8/4K3 w - d6 0 1' \\
'7k/6P1/8/8/8/8/8/K7 w - - 0 1'; do
  printf '%s\\n' \""'$fen" | node agent.js
done'

item.text: The edge-case checks are behaving correctly, including rejecting an en passant capture that would expose its own king. I’m doing a final black-side special-move pass and confirming the workspace contains no artifacts beyond the requested file.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "for fen in \\
'K7/8/8/8/8/8/6p1/7k b - - 0 1' \\
'4k3/8/8/8/3Pp3/8/8/4K3 b - d3 0 1' \\
'r3k2r/8/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 b kq - 0 1' \\
'4k3/8/8/8/8/8/3R4/4K3 b - - 0 1'; do
  out="'$(printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$fen" | node agent.js)
  printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$out"
  case "$out" in
    [a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8]|[a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8][qrbn]) ;;
    *) exit 1;;
  esac
done
node --check agent.js
test "$(find . -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 ! -name .git ! -name .agents ! -name .codex | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')\" = 1
test -f agent.js
test \""'$(wc -c < agent.js)" -le 51200'

/bin/zsh -lc "for fen in \\
'K7/8/8/8/8/8/6p1/7k b - - 0 1' \\
'4k3/8/8/8/3Pp3/8/8/4K3 b - d3 0 1' \\
'r3k2r/8/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 b kq - 0 1' \\
'4k3/8/8/8/8/8/3R4/4K3 b - - 0 1'; do
  out="'$(printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$fen" | node agent.js)
  printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$out"
  case "$out" in
    [a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8]|[a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8][qrbn]) ;;
    *) exit 1;;
  esac
done
node --check agent.js
test "$(find . -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 ! -name .git ! -name .agents ! -name .codex | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')\" = 1
test -f agent.js
test \""'$(wc -c < agent.js)" -le 51200'
